title: HyperlightDrifta's Mod Menu
body:
Note! : To remove a specific effect, select the effect again (selecting an effect you already have in the effect menu removes it)


This is a mod menu that adds features like, gamemode changer, time changer, weather changer, adding items into your inventory, adding XP, and more, and it can all be used without cheats enabled! Yes, it will work in hardcore. No, it won't work on servers. (at least not on non-vanilla servers, but vanilla servers have also not been tested)

There also custom keybinds that you can assign for changing gamemode, weather and time, and more.

Main Menu :
